evals.expected_output: A taster-mode audit showing channel overview, top 10 videos table, performance tiers, 3-5 key insights with specific numbers, content saturation score, upload strategy headline, 3 SEO problems identified (with data but NO fixes), projected impact headline, and a teaser box advertising the full audit. Should NOT include title rewrites, description templates, tag templates, keyword opportunities, competitor benchmarking, or any suggested fixes.

assertions.text: Report contains a Channel Overview table with subscriber count, average views, and median views
Report contains a Top 10 Videos table with at least 5 video rows including views, views/day, and engagement data
Report categorises videos into performance tiers (Hit/Solid/Underperformer) with specific video names listed
Report contains 3 or more key insights with specific numbers
Report contains a Content Saturation Score between 1 and 5 with topic groupings shown
Report identifies exactly 3 SEO Problems with supporting data but NOT the fix
Report does NOT contain title rewrites or suggested rewrites
Report does NOT contain a description template
Report does NOT contain keyword opportunities or competitor benchmarking
Report contains a teaser/CTA box advertising the full audit
Report contains a projected impact headline number
Report mentions upload strategy as headline but does NOT recommend a specific pace
